subject: Create Milestone 2 Specification for islam-intelligent
description:
Create comprehensive Milestone 2 specification document focusing on:
1. evidence_span generation (byte offsets + sha256)
2. retrieval returns evidence_span_id + snippet
3. citation verifier works end-to-end in docker-compose (postgres)
4. update eval so answerable cases pass, abstention cases remain abstain

Output should include: detailed task list + acceptance criteria + tests to add
